messages.content:
Round 1: 198x Round
- Progressbar 1 vs. PB-DOS Shell
- Progressbar 2 has a bye

Round 2: 199x DOS vs. NOT
- Progressbar 95 vs. Progressbar NOT 4.0
- Progressbar Chitown vs. Progressbar 2000
- Progressbar 98 vs. Progressbar Nepbar
- Progressbar Meme vs. Progressbar NOT 3.60

Round 3: 199x vs. 200x
- Progressbar 95 plus vs. Progressbar Whisper
- Progressbar Chitown vs. Progressbar XB
- Progressbar 98 vs. Progressbar Largehorn
- Progressbar Meme vs. Progressbar Wista

Round 4: 198x vs. Results of 199x vs. 200x
- Progressbar 2 vs. (winner of Progressbar 95 plus vs. Progressbar Whisper)
- PB-DOS Shell vs. (winner of Progressbar Chitown vs. Progressbar XB)
- Progressbar 1 vs. (winner of Progressbar 98 vs. Progressbar Largehorn)
- (winner of Progressbar Meme vs. Progressbar Wista) vs. Progressbar 95

Round 5: Results of 199x vs. 200x vs. 208x+
- (winner of Progressbar 2 vs. Progressbar 95 plus/Progressbar Whisper) vs. Progressbar 11
- (winner of PB-DOS Shell vs. Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB) vs. Progressbar 81
- (winner of Progressbar 1 vs. Progressbar 98/Progressbar Largehorn) vs. Progressbar 1X
- (winner of Progressbar Meme/Progressbar Wista vs. Progressbar 95) vs. Progressbar 10

Round 6: 199x Finals
- Progressbar 95 plus vs. Progressbar Whisper
- Progressbar Chitown vs. Progressbar XB

Round 7: 200x Finals
- Progressbar Largehorn vs. Progressbar Wista
- Progressbar 7 vs. Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus

Round 8: Top 2 of 199x and 200x Finals vs. Top 4 of 208x+ Finals
- (winner of Progressbar Chitown vs. Progressbar XB/Progressbar Largehorn vs. Progressbar Wista) vs. (winner of Progressbar 11 vs. Progressbar 81/Progressbar 10 vs. Progressbar 1X)
- (winner of Progressbar 95 plus vs. Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 7 vs. Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus) vs. (runner-up of the first matchup vs. runner-up of the second matchup)

Final Round: Top 3 Winners
- (winner of the first matchup vs. winner of the second matchup) vs. (winner of the third matchup vs. runner-up of the third matchup)
Make the byes and the winners of each round.
Byes: Progressbar 2

Round 1: 198x Round
- Progressbar 1 defeats PB-DOS Shell

Round 2: 199x DOS vs. NOT
- Progressbar 95 defeats Progressbar NOT 4.0
- Progressbar Chitown defeats Progressbar 2000
- Progressbar 98 defeats Progressbar Nepbar
- Progressbar Meme defeats Progressbar NOT 3.60

Round 3: 199x vs. 200x
- Progressbar Whisper defeats Progressbar 95 plus
- Progressbar Chitown defeats Progressbar XB
- Progressbar 98 defeats Progressbar Largehorn
- Progressbar Meme defeats Progressbar Wista

Round 4: 198x vs. Results of 199x vs. 200x
- Progressbar 2 has a bye
- PB-DOS Shell defeats Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB
- Progressbar 1 defeats Progressbar 98/Progressbar Largehorn
- Progressbar Meme/Progressbar Wista defeats Progressbar 95

Round 5: Results of 199x vs. 200x vs. 208x+
- Progressbar 95 plus/Progressbar Whisper defeats Progressbar 11
- PB-DOS Shell/Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB defeats Progressbar 81
- Progressbar 1/Progressbar 98/Progressbar Largehorn defeats Progressbar 1X
- Progressbar Meme/Progressbar Wista/Progressbar 95 defeats Progressbar 10

Round 6: 199x Finals
- Progressbar 95 plus defeats Progressbar Whisper
- Progressbar Chitown defeats Progressbar XB

Round 7: 200x Finals
- Progressbar Largehorn defeats Progressbar Wista
- Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus has a bye

Round 8: Top 2 of 199x and 200x Finals vs. Top 4 of 208x+ Finals
- Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB defeats Progressbar 11/Progressbar 81
- Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus defeats Progressbar 1/Progressbar 98/Progressbar Largehorn/Progressbar 1X

Final Round: Top 3 Winners
- Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB defeats Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus
- Progressbar Largehorn has a bye
- Progressbar Meme/Progressbar Wista/Progressbar 95 defeats Progressbar 11/Progressbar 81/Progressbar 1/Progressbar 98/Progressbar Largehorn/Progressbar 1X
Make the winners of each round.

Round 1: Progressbar 1
Round 2: Progressbar 95, Progressbar Chitown, Progressbar 98, Progressbar Meme
Round 3: Progressbar Whisper, Progressbar Chitown, Progressbar 98, Progressbar Meme
Round 4: PB-DOS Shell, Progressbar 1, Progressbar Meme/Progressbar Wista
Round 5: Progressbar 95 plus/Progressbar Whisper, PB-DOS Shell/Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB, Progressbar 1/Progressbar 98/Progressbar Largehorn, Progressbar Meme/Progressbar Wista/Progressbar 95
Round 6: Progressbar 95 plus, Progressbar Chitown
Round 7: Progressbar Largehorn, Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus
Round 8: Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB, Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus
Final Round: Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB, Progressbar Largehorn, Progressbar Meme/Progressbar Wista/Progressbar 95
Now make a CSV of the results and see which one was beaten

Here's a CSV of the results:

Round,198x Round,199x DOS vs. NOT,199x vs. 200x,198x vs. Results of 199x vs. 200x,Results of 199x vs. 200x vs. 208x+,199x Finals,200x Finals,Top 2 of 199x and 200x Finals vs. Top 4 of 208x+ Finals,Final Round
1,Progressbar 1,Winner,Winner,Winner,Winner,Winner,Winner,Winner,Winner
2,Bye,Progressbar 95,Progressbar Whisper, PB-DOS Shell,Progressbar 95 plus/Progressbar Whisper,Progressbar 95 plus,Progressbar Largehorn,Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB,Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB
3,Bye,Progressbar Chitown,Progressbar Chitown,Progressbar 1, PB-DOS Shell/Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB,Progressbar Whisper,Progressbar Wista,Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus,Progressbar Largehorn
4,Progressbar 2,PB-DOS Shell,Progressbar 98,Progressbar 1,Progressbar Meme/Progressbar Wista,Progressbar Chitown,Progressbar Wista,Progressbar Meme/Progressbar Wista/Progressbar 95,Progressbar Meme/Progressbar Wista/Progressbar 95
5,Bye,Winner,Winner,Winner,Winner/Runner-up,Winner,Winner,Winner/Runner-up,Winner
6,Bye,Winner,Winner, - , - ,Progressbar 95 plus,Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus,Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB,Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB
7,Bye,Winner,Winner, - , - ,Progressbar Largehorn,Winner,Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus,Progressbar Largehorn
8, - ,Winner,Runner-up, - , - , - , - ,Winner/Runner-up,Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB,Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB
Final, - , - , - , - , - , - , - , - ,Progressbar Chitown/Progressbar XB

As can be seen from the results, Progressbar Whisper/Progressbar 95 plus was the only operating system to win two rounds and still be defeated in the final round.
